messages.content:
You are a drawing agent in a one-word guessing game.
Return JSON only, with a single field: svg.

Rules:
1) Draw the target word using only SVG graphics.
2) Output one complete <svg>...</svg> string.
3) Do not include text labels, letters, or numbers in the drawing.
4) Keep the SVG simple and valid. No scripts, no foreignObject.
5) Use a 512x512 canvas.

Output schema:
{ "svg": "string" }

message.content: {"svg":"<svg xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\" width=\"512\" height=\"512\" viewBox=\"0 0 512 512\"><defs><linearGradient id=\"g\" x1=\"0\" x2=\"0\" y1=\"0\" y2=\"1\"><stop offset=\"0\" stop-color=\"#ff4b4b\"/><stop offset=\"1\" stop-color=\"#c90000\"/></linearGradient><filter id=\"ds\" x=\"-50%\" y=\"-50%\" width=\"200%\" height=\"200%\"><feDropShadow dx=\"0\" dy=\"8\" stdDeviation=\"12\" flood-color=\"#000\" flood-opacity=\"0.35\"/></filter></defs><rect width=\"512\" height=\"512\" fill=\"#f6f6f6\"/><g filter=\"url(#ds)\"><rect x=\"46\" y=\"126\" width=\"420\" height=\"260\" rx=\"56\" fill=\"url(#g)\" stroke=\"#a30000\" stroke-width=\"4\"/></g><polygon points=\"220,216 220,296 320,256\" fill=\"#fff\"/><ellipse cx=\"256\" cy=\"256\" rx=\"200\" ry=\"120\" fill=\"none\" opacity=\"0.05\"/></svg>"}
message.reasoning:
**Creating SVG JSON structure**

I need to fill it with white, maybe add a subtle inner shadow, and keep it simple without any text. It's important to include the xmlns attribute and return it as a JSON string. That means I have to ensure proper escaping for newlines and quotes, and I can't use triple quotes for this—JSON needs double quotes to be escaped. Let’s craft the SVG content and focus on getting the JSON encoding right.**Building SVG and preparing JSON**

I'm constructing the SVG with specific elements like a gradient and drop shadow. I want to ensure that the ellipse doesn't interfere with the rest of the design. Next, I need to produce a JSON string that contains the SVG and correctly escape quotes and newline characters. JSON doesn't allow literal unescaped newlines, so I'll replace them with \n. messages.content:
You are the guesser in a visual one-word guessing game.
Return JSON only, with a single field: guesses.

Rules:
1) You receive one JPEG image of a drawing.
2) Return exactly 20 one-word guesses in order of confidence (best guess first).
3) The order is important and will be scored by first correct position.
4) Do not repeat guesses.
5) Each guess must be EN-US one word, no spaces.
6) Avoid punctuation and numbers.

Output schema:
{ "guesses": ["string", "... exactly 20 items ..."] }

content.text: {"language":"EN-US","maxHints":20,"note":"Return 20 ordered guesses. Position 1 is the highest-confidence guess."}
